nodes.label: Professional Formulation Workspace
nodes.rationale: The product should be clearer than SoapCalc while staying fast, dense, trustworthy, and not overdesigned.

nodes.label: Draft Save And Version Save Model
nodes.norm_label: draft save and version save model

nodes.label: Filament Admin Data Stewardship
nodes.rationale: If a feature affects trust in the data engine, it belongs in admin.

nodes.label: Lightweight Tenancy Model
nodes.rationale: Single database row-level ownership and policies are chosen because Filament tenancy targets multi-organization switching, which is not v1.

nodes.label: Clinical Naturalist Design System
nodes.rationale: The UI should combine lab-tool rigor with restrained craft warmth and avoid decorative crafty aesthetics.

nodes.label: Custom Tailwind Public UI
nodes.rationale: The user-facing workspace needs dense custom layouts and should not feel like a generic SaaS back office.

nodes.label: Ingredient Versioning
nodes.rationale: Versioning allows naming, legal, commercial, and source data to change without losing traceability.
